title: Weather: Rain expected on Saturday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Extremely high...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over the northern and central parts of Limpopo, the western parts of the North West and Free State, as well as the eastern parts of the Northern Cape according to the South African Weather Service.


> Regional forecast:


Western CapeFine in the west, otherwise partly cloudy and cool to warm. The wind along the coast will be fresh to strong south to south-easterly, but light and variable along the south coast where it will become moderate to fresh easterly.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy and cool with light rain along the eastern coastline. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate easterly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeCloudy and cool with isolated showers and rain, except in the north-west. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate south-westerly, becoming easterly by afternoon.


> Expected temperatures:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
